report.summary: Cycle v5: No new commits since Mar 25 batch deploy (21aaf5b). 319 uncommitted files (31 modified + 288 untracked) — up from 308 in v4. 145 TS errors in 6 files (all JSX syntax — non-blocking). All 6 API routes present with correct cache TTLs. 105 published slugs still missing page.tsx (82% coverage). Deploy remains P0 — 3 days pending.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Page coverage: 478/583 published slugs have page.tsx files (82.0%). 105 slugs still missing — includes 10 original Day-1 learn guides (/learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /learn/crypto-etfs-complete-guide, etc.) and /compare/exchanges hub.

TypeScript: 145 errors across 6 files — all JSX syntax issues (unescaped entities, missing closing tags). Files: crypto-arbitrage-strategies, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield (all learn pages), plus structured-data.examples.ts. Error types: 56x comma expected, 20x expression expected, 17x unexpected token. Same as v4 — no regressions.
No new pages built or published since last cycle — no new regressions to flag.
Egress proxy blocks direct site verification (degen0x.com unreachable from sandbox). Cannot confirm live 200 status codes remotely.
Build artifacts (.next/) present from last local build. No new build attempted this cycle (no code changes).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields, prices.

Cache TTLs verified — fear-greed: s-maxage=600 (10min) + SWR 1200. trending: s-maxage=300 (5min) + SWR 600. market-metrics: s-maxage=60 (1min) + SWR 120. market-dominance: s-maxage=300 (5min) + SWR 600. defi-yields: dynamic CACHE_DURATION + SWR 2x. prices: s-maxage=60 (1min) + SWR 120.
All routes have fallback error responses with shorter cache (s-maxage=30-60s) — good degradation pattern.
Rate limiter: 0/6 core routes protected. No rate limiting middleware integrated yet — carry-over from Day 1.
Cannot verify live API health due to egress block. Code-level inspection shows correct CoinGecko + DefiLlama + Alternative.me integrations with proper error handling.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — 'batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes'. This is 3 days old.
319 uncommitted files pending (31 modified + 288 untracked) — up from 308 in v4 cycle. Growth due to new report files and OG image edits accumulating across automated cycles.
Vercel project: cryptodegen (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75). Auto-deploy on push to main. No manual trigger needed — just needs git commit + push.
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard or deployment logs from sandbox (egress blocked).
No error spikes detectable from code — no new code changes since last deploy. Production should be stable on 21aaf5b.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing new — this is an automated monitoring cycle. No code changes, no publishes, no new content since v4.
DELTA FROM V4: +11 uncommitted files (308→319). All from automated report generation (this and prior cycles writing JSON to reports/). Zero code changes.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (unchanged): (1) Deploy — 319 uncommitted files, P0 for 3 days. (2) 2 publish queue items blocked (slug mismatch + missing page.tsx). (3) 0/6 API routes rate-limited. (4) 145 TS errors in 6 files. (5) 105 published slugs missing page.tsx.
NEEDS JEFE'S ATTENTION: Git commit + push is the single highest-leverage action. 3 days of accumulated work (170+ pages, 62+ OG images, 30+ learn pages, UX fixes) invisible to production and Google.
